coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Relax. Breathe. Enjoy the ride. 5:51 of engine-building.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Aerobic base building. 75% for 5:51. This is the foundation of all fitness.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Building the base. 5:51 at 75%. This is where champions are made.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 5:51 at 75%. The pace where you can contemplate life's mysteries. Like why you own a bike.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into ride. Smooth and steady. Build your aerobic base.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 75% for 36:00. Easy miles make fast racing. Stop overthinking.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Steady state endurance. 75% FTP, 85-100 rpm. Sustainable for hours.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 5 minutes of base work done. This feels easy — that's exactly the point. Patience builds power.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 75% FTP. This is so easy it's almost boring. Almost.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 13% complete. 3 minutes left. Let your mind wander. Stay in zone.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 41 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 36min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/1. Every rep makes you stronger. Keep pushing. 0 more to go.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 41 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
